/ci2 1 弓子！　助けが来てくれたでござるよ！
これで押し切れるでござる！

/ci2 1 <%me>殿！
かたじけないでござる！

なんたる無様……
申し訳ないでござる……
しくじったでござる……！

弓子！？
おのれ、よくも弓子を……！

/ci2 1 Yumiko! Help has come for us! Now we can fight
our way out!

/ci2 1 A million thanks,
Lord <%me>!
How clumsy... I can offer no excuse...
I have failed!
Yumiko!? How can this be...

/ci2 2 うーむ……拙者は怒られてばかりで
参考にはならぬかもしれんが
真心込めて贈ればよいと思うでござる！

/ci2 2 まずは感謝が大事でござるな！
きちんと真心を込めれば
大丈夫なはずでござる……！

/ci3 2 不覚……！
拙者の力不足が原因でござる……

/mn5 やられてしまったでござる……
イツキ殿、すまぬ……

/mn2 イツキ殿！
仇は必ず討つでござる！

/ci2 2 As a humble soul so often on the receiving end of
anger I may not have much advice to offer, but I do
believe a gift should be offered with sincerity!

/ci2 2 Gratitude comes first and foremost! I must simply
convey the fullness of my feelings and all will
be well.

/ci3 2 I have failed! My lack of strength has been
revealed...
/mn5 I have been defeated. Forgive me, Lord Itsuki...
/mn2 Lord Itsuki! I vow to avenge you!

/ci2 2 催し物の邪魔する不埒千万の輩は
若き友たちのため……
拙者たちが倒すでござる！

/ci2 2 よし、邪魔者は倒したでござる！
拙者たちは、若き友を見守るため
次の邪魔者を成敗しにいくでござる！

/ci3 2 無念……
一度、退かせてもらうでござる。

/mn5 む、無念……
すまぬ……

/mn18 キッド殿！
よくも……！
刀のサビにしてくれるでござる！

/ci2 2 For the benefit of our young friends we shall cut
down this insolent gang of audacious ruffians who
dare to disturb the event!

/ci2 2 Huzzah! We have slain them! To ensure the safety
of our young friends we shall move on to punish
the next group of interlopers!

/ci3 2 How unfortunate... Allow me to retreat for the
time being.
/mn5 A-alas... I beg forgiveness...

/mn18 Lord Kid! How dare they! Nothing will remain
of them but rust spots on my sword!
